skincare.summary: Skincare sellers in Indonesia are winning with ingredient-led reviews and dermatologist-style education hooks.

trends.whyWinning: Educated buyers want active ingredients named clearly before they trust a new serum.
Transformation clips build desire fast for brightening products with visible results.
Mid-price serums win when sellers prove value versus imported alternatives.

fashion.summary: Fashion sellers are leaning into outfit transitions and fabric close-ups for modest and streetwear drops.

trends.whyWinning: Quick styling changes keep watch time high for affordable fashion hauls.
Quality-focused buyers need proof the material feels better than fast-fashion dupes.
Aspirational styling content helps new sellers compete without brand recognition.

food.summary: Food sellers are using ASMR prep shots and origin stories for snacks and home-made sauces.

trends.whyWinning: Sensory food footage stops scrollers and makes homemade products feel premium.
Authentic backstory builds trust for new food brands without reviews.
Variety packs help cold-start sellers increase first-order basket size.
